description_long: This object consists of two distinct residential houses situated on a rectangular plot with a dark ground plane. Both houses feature modern architectural elements, including gable roofs with dark shingles and a combination of stone and white exterior walls. The larger house has a prominent two-story section with a covered entryway supported by columns, while the smaller house appears to be a single-story structure with large windows and a garage. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some large picture windows and smaller, regularly spaced ones. The roofs are primarily gable-style, and the houses are separated by a driveway or open space. The overall design suggests a contemporary suburban neighborhood setting.
description: Two modern houses with gable roofs, stone and white facades, and a mix of large and small windows, set on a rectangular plot.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the rear and side of both houses, highlighting the stone facades and the separation between the two buildings.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front of both houses, revealing the main entryways, garage doors, and the prominent gable roofs.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the back of the houses, with visible patios, large windows, and the open space between the buildings.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a side perspective, emphasizing the length of the buildings and the arrangement of windows along the facades.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and regular smaller windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature covered porches with columns, wide steps, and modern doors.
